description: Recto: the ending of a letter, in the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, likely to the Nagid Avraham (Maimonides) (see verso margin), mentioning R. Yehuda and someone's daughter. Somewhat difficult to decipher. Verso: the remnants of the address and an alphabetical writing exercise. (Information in part from Goitein's note card, previously attached to PGPID 6316, now missing.)
